name: iris-lean
description: Tooling for the Iris-Lean porting effort: skills and agents for faithfully porting Rocq (Coq) Iris to Lean 4.

plugins.name: iris-port
plugins.description: A protocol for faithfully porting Rocq (Coq) Iris framework code to Lean 4. Bundles the /port-iris orchestration skill, three specialist subagents (iris-rocq-expert, lean4-fixer, lean-style-critic), the porting rules/workflow/style knowledge base, and the /learn-diff style-training loop.
